alias: HVAC - Office Work Schedule: Re-apply Mode
description: When schedule.office_work changes state (start or end of a work window), re-run hvac_apply_mode with conditions skipped. Without this, the office setpoint wouldn't update at 8:30 AM / 5 PM until something else triggered Apply Mode (presence change, season flip, manual apply button). skip_condition: true matches the existing awake/asleep time-trigger pattern.
